fields.Name: Salesforce - Get Account
fields.Description: Retrieves a single Account record from Salesforce by its external ID

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The unique ID of the Account record to retrieve

fields.Name: Record
fields.Description: The retrieved Account record with all fields

fields.Name: Salesforce - Create Account
fields.Description: Creates a new Account record in Salesforce

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the newly created Account record
Create not supported by this connector

fields.Name: Salesforce - Update Account
fields.Description: Updates an existing Account record in Salesforce. Only provided fields are changed.

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the Account record to update
Update not supported by this connector

fields.Name: Salesforce - Delete Account
fields.Description: Deletes (archives) a Account record from Salesforce

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the Account record to delete
Delete not supported by this connector

fields.Name: Salesforce - Search Account
fields.Description: Searches for Account records in Salesforce matching the given field filters

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100)

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist
